passes.title: American Heritage Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date.
Pricing: Reduced general admission for up to 2 adults and 3 children at $3 per person.
Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.
THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below).
Dates: This pass is available for the following 2026 dates and ferries:
Georges Island:        May 15-June 14: Thursday through Sunday      June 16-September 1: Daily
Spectacle Island:        July 15-September 1: Daily      September 4-21: Thursday through Sunday      September 26-October 13: Friday through Sunday
Peddocks Island (from Hingham):      June 15-September 7: Daily except Tuesday      September 10-October 12: Thursday through Sunday
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person.
source_phrases: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below).
Dates: This pass is available for the following 2026 dates and ferries:
Georges Island:        May 15-June 14: Thursday through Sunday      June 16-September 1: Daily
Spectacle Island:        July 15-September 1: Daily      September 4-21: Thursday through Sunday      September 26-October 13: Friday through Sunday
Peddocks Island (from Hingham):      June 15-September 7: Daily except Tuesday      September 10-October 12: Thursday through Sunday
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person.

Additional Instructions: -Pre-registration is required. Visit the Boston Harbor Islands website to reserve. -When purchasing your ticket, expand the “Enter Gift Card, Promo Code, or Redeem Points” option and enter the e-code into the “Coupon/Voucher Code” field.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.
Pricing: Free admission to the Mapparium globe for up to 4 people (children under 5 always free).
Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.
source_phrases: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.

passes.title: Christian Science Plaza
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 6 people at $10 off the at-the-gate admission rate for each guest. Rates change seasonally.
Additional instructions: -Tickets must be bought at the ticket booth. Online purchase is not allowed with pass. -Discount is not valid on holidays, for packages, or for use at evening events. -The farm and maze are open weather permitting. Please call or visit the Davis Farmland website the day of your visit to check their status.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.
Pricing: Free admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children.
Additional instructions: - Pre-registration is recommended. Visit the Trustees of Reservations website to reserve. -Select the GO Pass ticket option when purchasing your tickets. You must still bring your paper pass.
Please note: deCordova has temporarily suspended indoor art exhibitions starting March 13, 2023, for upgrades expected to take two to three years. All other events, programs, and activities will continue as planned. For more information, click here .

passes.title: Decordova Sculpture Park And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: At the Bacon Free Library, this pass is a returnable pass. At the Morse Institute Library, this pass is an e-coupon.
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 3 people at 50% off per person.
Additional instructions: -Present pass or e-coupon at Admissions to receive discount.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children at 50% off per person (children under 2 always free).
Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. All members of your party must be in one vehicle. -The Alden Digital Planetarium, Explorer Express Train, or any special events are not eligible for this discount.

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date.
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at 50% off per person, plus $1 each per child ages 6-17 (children under 5 always free).
Additional instructions: -Special events, tours, and classes are not eligible for this discount. -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.

passes.title: The Icon Museum And Study Center
Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
THIS PASS DOES NOT NEED TO BE RESERVED!
Beginning July 10, 2024, present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. No pass is needed. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.
source_phrases: THIS PASS DOES NOT NEED TO BE RESERVED!

Beginning July 10, 2024, present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. No pass is needed. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at $2 per person.
Children under age 2 are always free.
Additional instructions: -Valid during normal hours of operation at any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. -This is a single-use pass and does not need to be returned to the library.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date.
Pricing: Free parking for 1 car at a Massachusetts State Park.
Additional instructions: -Pass is not eligible for use at the Gardens at Elm Bank; the Quabbin Reservoir; the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots; camping; or any on-street DCR location that charges an hourly rate.
Please note that this pass must be returned to the library where you picked it up -- either the Bacon Free Library or the Morse Institute Library -- by 9:30am the day after your reservation. Overdue fines are $3/day. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
source_phrases: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation.
Pricing:  Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at $15 per person and 4 youths aged 7-17 at $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition). Children under 7 are admitted free.
Additional instructions: - Pre-registration is recommended. Visit the Museum of Fine Arts website and use the e-code discount to reserve. -To access your e-code, click "Access Pass" in your confirmation email. The e-code is found under the barcode.
source_phrases: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: E-coupon, emailed upon reservation.
Pricing: Reduced general admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person (children under 3 always free).
Additional instructions: -Your Library Pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass. -Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit. -When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily). -If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: Type of pass: E-coupon, emailed upon reservation.

If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily). -If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.
Pricing:   Reduced admission for up to 2 adults and children at family membership admission pricing.
Additional instructions: - Pre-registration is recommended for some sites. Each site has its own admissions policy and pricing. Visit the Trustees of Reservations website to verify your destination’s policy and pricing. -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. If pre-registering, select the GO Pass ticket option or enter the discount code from your email reservation. -Pass is valid for admission only; other discounts are not eligible . -Popular Trustees destinations with admission fees include Bartholomew’s Cobble, Castle Hill, Crane Beach, deCordova Sculpture Park & Museum, Fruitlands Museum, Long Point Wildlife Refuge, and World’s End.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Type of pass: E-coupon, emailed upon reservation.
Pricing: Free admission for up to 5 people. One pass per party.
Additional instructions: -Present pass reservation confirmation email upon arrival to receive discount. -The USS Constitution Ship operates separately and has different hours from the Museum. Visit their website for complete visitor information.

Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date.

Additional instructions: -Pass may be used at either zoo. Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. -Special and evening events are not eligible for this discount.
